zh.Bawtry, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Morton Sr.於1375年5月21日出生在英國越可爾巴福崔時，他的父親Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton24歲，母親Lady Lucynda de Browndon25歲。他和Cicely Kniveton至少有3個兒子。他去世於大約1415年在英國享年41歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾。

zh-hans.Bawtry, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Morton Sr.于1375年5月21日出生在英国越可爾巴福崔时，他的父亲Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton24岁，母亲Lady Lucynda de Browndon25岁。他和Cicely Kniveton至少有3个儿子。他去世于大约1415年在英国享年41岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Morton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

variants.name: Moreton
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Murton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places in northern England, all named in Old English as ‘settlement or enclosure at the marsh or moor’, from mōr ‘marsh, fen, moor’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. There has been considerable confusion with both Morton and Merton .

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Morton Sr. was born on 21 May 1375, in Bawtry, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton, was 24 and his mother, Lady Lucynda de Browndon, was 25. He had at least 3 sons with Cicely Kniveton. He died about 1415, in England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Morton Sr. est né le 21 mai 1375, à Bawtry, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Lucynda de Browndon, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Cicely Kniveton. Il est décédé environ 1415, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Morton Sr. am 21. Mai 1375 in Bawtry, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton 24 und seine Mutter Lady Lucynda de Browndon 25. Er hatte mit Cicely Kniveton mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1415 im Alter von 41 Jahren in England und wurde in Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Morton Sr. è nato il il 21 maggio 1375 nel Bawtry, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Lucynda de Browndon, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Cicely Kniveton. Morì circa 1415, nel England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Shropshire, England.

ja.Bawtry, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアバウトリー
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Morton Sr.が1375年5月21日にイギリスヨークシュアイアバウトリーで生まれた時，父Sir Charles De Morton Lord Mortonは24歳，母Lady Lucynda de Browndonは25歳であった。彼はCicely Knivetonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1415年にイギリスで41歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Morton Sr.(이)가 1375년 5월 21일 영국 요르크실르 바w트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Lucynda de Browndon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Cicely Kniveton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1415년 영국에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Morton Sr. nasceu em 21 de maio de 1375, em Bawtry, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Lucynda de Browndon, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Cicely Kniveton. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1415, em Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Morton Sr. родился 21 мая 1375 г. в местности бавтри, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Lucynda de Browndon, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Cicely Kniveton. Он умер около 1415 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Morton Sr. nació el 21 de mayo de 1375, en Bawtry, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Charles De Morton Lord Morton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Lucynda de Browndon, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Cicely Kniveton. Murió aproximadamente 1415, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Shropshire, Inglaterra.
